evidence_summary: John Carter and Tars Tarkas intercept Sarkoja within the Thark interior to neutralize her political influence through intimidation, clearing the path for a leadership challenge against Jeddak Tal Hajus.

To avoid the wrath of Jeddak Tal Hajus, John Carter and Tars Tarkas decide to confront him in council. They intercept the priestess Sarkoja, using intimidation to force her to flee Thark, removing her influence from the upcoming political shift.
John Carter and Tars Tarkas moving through the shadows of Thark.
Sarkoja fleeing the scene, leaving the duo in control.
Intercepting and intimidating Sarkoja to force her exile.
